---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report incorrect findings, crashes, or unexpected behavior
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

```bash
node bin/agents.js run \
  --config ... \
  --skill ... \
  --input '...' \
  --project ...
```

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened (paste output).

## Environment

| | |
|---|---|
| OS | [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04] |
| Node.js | [e.g. 20.11.0] |
| agents-runtime version | [e.g. 1.0.0] |
| Language being analyzed | [e.g. Python, JavaScript] |

## Additional Context
Any other context, screenshots, or sample files.
